## What does this PR do?

A brief description of the change.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Dashboard improvement
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Config / format change

## Testing

How did you verify this works? List what you tested manually.

## Dashboard compatibility

If you changed `events.md` output format or `markers.json` schema, confirm:
- [ ] `**When:**`, `**Where:**`, `**Why this matters:**`, `**Relevance:**` field names unchanged
- [ ] Star format still `★★★☆☆ (X/10)`
- [ ] `events.md` written with LF line endings (binary mode)
- [ ] `markers.json` fields unchanged

## AI prompt included

If this PR includes an AI-assisted change, paste the full prompt and key reasoning
in this section (see CONTRIBUTING.md). PRs without this for AI-generated code will
be closed.

## Does this introduce any privacy risk?

- [ ] No new external data transmission
- [ ] No personal data exposed in committed files
- [ ] Config files remain gitignored
